summary: FS Edit Features testing completed. Fixed critical frontend bug (intervencoesRelatorio undefined). Backend APIs 100% pass. Frontend edit features verified working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description for DialogContent (accessibility)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: intervencoesRelatorio was undefined - changed to intervencoes (2 occurrences at lines 5746 and 5804)
seed_data_creation: Used existing FS#356 (id: 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85) with 4 interventions, 2 photos, 2 signatures, 3 materials
context_for_next_testing_agent: FS edit features fully tested and working. Photo edit modal has date and description fields. Signature edit is inline with first name, last name, date, time fields. Move dropdowns appear for photos and materials when multiple interventions exist. Backend PUT endpoints for /fotografias, /assinaturas, /materiais, /equipamentos all support intervencao_id for move functionality.

tests: Edit button visible on photo hover
Edit modal opens with date and description fields
data-testid attributes present: edit-foto-{id}, edit-foto-data, edit-foto-descricao, save-foto-descricao
Inline edit mode with first name, last name, date, time fields
data-testid attributes present: edit-sig-{id}, edit-sig-first-name, edit-sig-last-name, edit-sig-date, edit-sig-time, save-sig-edit
Move dropdown visible for photos when multiple interventions exist
Move dropdown visible for materials when multiple interventions exist

bug_fixed.root_cause: Variable name typo - code used 'intervencoesRelatorio' but state variable is 'intervencoes'
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed 'intervencoesRelatorio' to 'intervencoes' at lines 5746 and 5804 in TechnicalReports.jsx
bug_fixed.verification: Frontend no longer crashes when opening FS detail modal
